scripts.dev:prepare: npm run migrate -w backend && npm run seed:demo -w backend && npm run seed:demo:materials -w backend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.dev:app-only: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
